session.name: MPI-324 RunPod validation sweep COMPLETE (MPI-326/300/310 closed on remote evidence; MPI-329/330 carded). NEXT PHASE = the public 1.1.0 release flow.

goal.original: Validate every RunPod-deferred card in ONE Pod session so the cards can close before release, then get the app release-ready ASAP (public target is now 1.1.0).
goal.summary: The Pod sweep is DONE. All three remote-deferred cards were validated on an RTX PRO 4000 Pod (volume cubric-vision-EU-RO-1) and moved to done: MPI-326 (remote 5s poll-storm fix - verified idle-connected: models filter 0/32 over 20s, op dropdown stays open, Denoise slider holds; COMMITTED 256793df), MPI-300 (Qwen-Edit - tiers, 2-image combine, 3rd-chip Input_Image_3 injects on BOTH engines, style rack; caveat = multi-subject one-pass is model-unstable per MPI-313, NOT a code bug), MPI-310 (Image Describer - full shared-dep guard lifecycle proven remote: 2->1 holder kept on Krea uninstall, 1->0 freed 5.24GB on describer uninstall, describe from gallery/history + negative-flip). Two new cards filed: MPI-329 (perf: cold model-load ~2min, maybe just a weak GPU) and MPI-330 (removing a non-last image chip may strand the required Input_Image -> Qwen silent no-output; non-blocking). Pod torn down. ALL kanban state this session is UNCOMMITTED except the MPI-326 code fix. Remaining = the 1.1.0 release flow (version-constant rename + promote to master), then mpi-end.

completed: MPI-326 verified on the Pod (idle-connected: Network models filter 0/32 over 20s = Fix A killed the 5s poll; op dropdown stayed open; Denoise slider held 0.71 no snap-back) -> moved to done -> js/shell.js + js/data/modelRegistry.js COMMITTED 256793df (ESLint clean).

MPI-300 verified on the Pod: tier radio (3 tiers via Head Swap), 2-image combine (Head Swap), 3rd-chip Input_Image_3 (graph wiring traced correct + chip-3-unique content landed LOCAL qwenEdit_003 AND REMOTE qwenEdit_005 = injects both engines), style rack (3 styles remote incl 3D) -> moved to done. Caveat recorded: scene + 2 distinct subjects one-pass is model-unstable (-> chain per MPI-313), injection is correct.

MPI-310 verified on the Pod - full shared-dep guard lifecycle both engine twins: inverse-GC kept the abliterated encoder on Krea uninstall (2->1 holder), describe from gallery + history landed the caption, negative-mode flip correct, describer uninstall freed 5.24GB (104.2->99GB) + row flipped to Install(5.24GB) after refresh -> moved to done + stale destructive-bug attention flag cleared.
MPI-329 carded (perf: remote cold model-load ~2min vs ~14s warm; user caveat = may just be a weak inference card, retest on 4090/5090).
MPI-330 carded (removing a non-last image chip may strand the required Input_Image -> Qwen silent no-output; deterministic repro + code entry points in the card).
MPI-324 results table filled (all rows resolved).
pending: RUN THE 1.1.0 RELEASE FLOW. Public target is 1.1.0 (NOT 1.2.0). The CHANGELOG is ALREADY DONE by peer session MPI-327 (single RELEASE_NOTES['1.1.0'], archival 2026-07-09-v1.1.0.md, UNRELEASED cleared, 1.2.0 stub/archival/approval-token deleted) - do NOT rebuild it.

VERSION-CONSTANT RENAME (owed, full step list in .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-327/validation.md): appVersion.js APP_VERSION 1.2.0 -> 1.1.0 (SCHEMA_VERSION stays 4); package.json + package-lock.json (root + packages[''].version) -> 1.1.0; operationRegistry.js AND operation_registry.json appVersionIntroduced 1.2.0 -> 1.1.0 for the 9 ops (poseReference, krea2Edit, qwenEdit, removeBackground, imageDescribe, appImageRegen, appSdxl4k, appVideoStitch, appHeadSwap) - keep both files in lockstep; npm run release:approve (fresh .approved-1.1.0.json); npm run release:check green (it stays RED until APP_VERSION is bumped - expected mid-flight).

Promote branch 1.2.0 -> master AS 1.1.0 via mpi-merge-branches (creates a fresh tier-neutral Cloudflare pre-release link, GC's the prior one; NOT a GitHub release, NOT a git tag) OR mpi-release-public if a public GitHub release is intended.

BEFORE mpi-end commits the kanban state: repair the PRE-EXISTING event-log corruption (escape-only, no wording change): global .agents/mpi-kanban/events.jsonl lines 1260/1265 (embedded newline) + 1324 (backslash-escaped quotes), and tasks/MPI-300/events.jsonl line 3 (G:\CubricModels single backslash). Grep for others first. Validate with python json.loads per line; assert only backslashes/escapes changed.

Commit all uncommitted kanban state (board.json, task.json's, event logs, validation.md's) at mpi-end, then run mpi-end. Move MPI-324 to done at close (sweep complete; Head Swap residual lives on MPI-299/306, not a gate).
LATER (non-blocking): investigate MPI-330 with the deterministic repro (attach 2-3 chips to Qwen-Edit, remove the FIRST, generate -> silent no-output = slot-repack bug).

next_action.description: Run the public 1.1.0 release flow. The Pod sweep is COMPLETE (MPI-326/300/310 all done on remote evidence; MPI-326 fix committed 256793df; Pod torn down). Do the version-constant rename per .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-327/validation.md: APP_VERSION 1.2.0 -> 1.1.0 in appVersion.js + package.json + package-lock.json; appVersionIntroduced 1.2.0 -> 1.1.0 for the 9 new ops in BOTH operationRegistry.js and operation_registry.json; npm run release:approve; npm run release:check green. The CHANGELOG is already done by MPI-327 - do NOT rebuild it. Then promote branch 1.2.0 -> master AS 1.1.0 (mpi-merge-branches, or mpi-release-public for a GitHub release). BEFORE mpi-end commits the kanban state, repair the pre-existing event-log corruption escape-only (global events.jsonl 1260/1265/1324, tasks/MPI-300/events.jsonl line 3, grep for others). Then commit the kanban state, move MPI-324 to done, and run mpi-end. release:check is RED until APP_VERSION is bumped - expected, not a regression.

key_decisions: Public release target is 1.1.0, NOT 1.2.0 (internal 1.1.0 + 1.1.1 never shipped publicly). MPI-327 already aggregated the CHANGELOG into a single RELEASE_NOTES['1.1.0']; the version-constant rename is the only release-code work still owed.

MPI-326 root cause: shell.js _initRemoteStatusFeed re-emits remote:connection {connected:true} every 5s (HEALTHY_MS) for the live cost badge; the connect-sync listener had no edge guard so it re-ran syncModelInstalled() every 5s -> models:checked storm -> op-dropdown teardown + slider DOM rebuild. Fix A edge-guard (shell.js:1370, if connected AND NOT _wasRemoteConnected; MPI-200 pod-swap preserved via the disconnect edge resetting the flag) + Fix B diff-gate the models:checked emit (modelRegistry.js:223). Remote-verified. Committed 256793df.

MPI-300 3rd-chip Input_Image_3 injection is CORRECT (graph traced not-crossed: image1<-34<-70, image2<-169<-104, image3<-171<-72; both TextEncodeQwenImageEditPlus encoders get all three). chip-3-unique content landed local AND remote. The multi-subject one-pass instability is a MODEL limit (-> MPI-313 chaining), not a code defect.

MPI-310 shared-dep guard proven remote end-to-end on BOTH engine twins (2->1 holder kept, 1->0 freed 5.24GB). The old plugin-row display-staleness was just refresh-lag (row flipped to Install after the Model-Library refresh).

MPI-330 (non-blocking, found post-sweep on the local engine): removing a non-last image chip may strand the required Input_Image -> Qwen silent no-output ('Generation completed but no output returned', card discarded). PRIMARY hypothesis = chip-slot repack (project_media_slots_addressable_never_packed - never splice/repack). NOT the MPI-326 fix (that only gates install-state sync), NOT a local-gen regression (Krea t2i generated fine). Deterministic repro in the card.

Pre-existing event-log corruption discovered (predates this session, already in the M state at start): global events.jsonl lines 1260/1265 (embedded newline) + 1324 (backslash-escaped quotes), tasks/MPI-300/events.jsonl line 3 (G:\CubricModels single backslash). Must be escape-only-repaired before any kanban commit - the backslash trap breaks the board render.
constraints: release:check stays RED until APP_VERSION is bumped to 1.1.0 - expected mid-flight, not a regression.
CHANGELOG is already done by MPI-327 - do NOT rebuild releaseNotes.js or the archival md.
operationRegistry.js and operation_registry.json must stay in lockstep (release:check compares them); NEVER regenerate operation_registry.json (it strips universal flags).
Event-log corruption repair is escape-only - after fixing, assert the raw line differs ONLY by backslashes/escapes so no wording drifts (kanban.md backslash trap).
MPI-330 is non-blocking for 1.1; do not gate the release on it.
Kanban writes are pre-authorized; all this session's kanban edits are uncommitted (commit at mpi-end). The MPI-326 code fix is already committed (256793df).

resume_prompt: Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/a624c365-7105-4fea-a7ac-a74346d60c35.json and use mpi-continue to continue.
